Stripe support

Support the tiny arcade cabinet.

Arcade Skill stays free and ranked play stays fair: no paid health, no paid revives, no leaderboard advantage. Stripe support is for people who like the weird little developer toy enough to keep it alive.

Stripe checkout status: the payment link is being connected after Stripe finishes account review. The live button will become a buy.stripe.com checkout link through the manifest, without a skill reinstall.

Stripe checkout pending Back to game GitHub repo
